title: Constitutional Decision Record (CDR)
description: Immutable governance record of a major architectural, policy, or operational decision affecting the Blackstone Ecosystem. BKGC v2.0 Art. XXXIII. CDRs are never modified — corrections require a new CDR. Maintained in BKR-11.

cdr_number.description: Sequential CDR number. Format: CDR-{NNNNN}. 5-digit zero-padded. Never reused. BKR-02.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the decision.

filed_by.description: Governance Board member(s) who filed this CDR. Typically: Isiah Howard, Founder/CEO, IKE Solutions LLC.

trigger.description: Description of what event, milestone, or requirement triggered this CDR.

decision.description: The full text of the decision made. Immutable after filing.

scope.description: Description of which agents, documents, or processes this CDR applies to.

subordinate_standards_activated.description: If this CDR activates specific standards, list them here.

implementation_note.description: Implementation guidance, grace periods, or transition instructions.

supersedes_cdr.description: CDR number this record supersedes, if any.

superseded_by_cdr.description: CDR number that supersedes this record, if any.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date this CDR becomes effective. Defaults to filed_at if not specified.

expiry_date.description: ISO 8601 date this CDR expires (for grace periods and temporary decisions).

notes.description: Additional context. Not part of the formal decision record.
